events.name: Swallowed a Guitar Pick
events.text: {name} swallowed a guitar pick while trying to look mysterious.

events.name: Cryptic Rant Posted
events.text: {name} posted a cryptic rant at 3:14 AM and now feels oddly powerful.

events.name: Started Feud With Sound Tech
events.text: {name} insulted a sound tech and now every monitor in town smells revenge.

events.name: Wrote a Masterpiece
events.text: {name} wrote something incredible and refuses to explain it.

events.name: Stole Strings
events.text: {name} stole strings from another mutant and called it collaboration.

events.name: Learned Jazz Against Your Wishes
events.text: {name} accidentally learned jazz shapes in secret.

events.name: Slept in Merch Bin
events.text: {name} slept in the merch bin and woke up full of lint and purpose.

events.name: Went Viral for the Wrong Reason
events.text: A clip of {name} falling off a monitor stack is now everywhere.

events.name: Tube Glass Crack
events.text: The tube around {name} developed a dramatic crack and leaked slime.

events.name: Demands Hand-Crafted Water
events.text: {name} refuses normal hydration and demands hand-crafted water.

events.name: Joined a Second Band
events.text: {name} joined a second band without asking. The chaos is marketable.

events.name: Destroyed Green Room
events.text: {name} trashed a green room like a tiny landfill tornado.

events.name: Mysterious Rash After Ska
events.text: {name} developed a mysterious rash after exposure to ska horns.

events.name: Disturbing Fan Mail
events.text: {name} received fan mail made entirely of glitter and blood-red ink.
